title: MJ Album Cover Designer
promptText: [ALBUM_CONCEPT] album cover art, [MUSIC_GENRE] genre aesthetic, [VISUAL_STYLE] visual style, [COLOR_MOOD] color mood, [CENTRAL_IMAGERY] as the focal point, typography-ready composition with clear space for album title at [TEXT_POSITION], atmospheric and emotionally evocative, square format 1:1 aspect ratio, record label quality, vinyl-worthy artwork, inspired by the visual language of [REFERENCE_ERA] era album art, high detail, dramatic composition, professional album artwork, print resolution quality --ar 1:1 --s 750 --q 2
description: This prompt generates striking album cover artwork that captures the mood and genre of your music. Album covers are the visual identity of a musical release, and this prompt creates artwork that communicates genre, mood, and artistic vision at a glance. It produces square-format compositions with intentional space for typography, ensuring the art works with your album title and artist name overlaid. The prompt draws on era-specific visual traditions while maintaining a contemporary edge. It is perfect for independent musicians, bands, producers, and record labels who need professional cover art for streaming platforms, vinyl releases, and promotional materials.

variables.name: ALBUM_CONCEPT
variables.description: The conceptual theme of the album
variables.example: solitude in a neon-lit city at night

variables.name: COLOR_MOOD
variables.example: deep purple and neon pink with cool blue shadows

variables.name: CENTRAL_IMAGERY
variables.description: Main visual element of the cover
variables.example: a lone figure walking through rain-soaked streets with neon reflections

variables.name: TEXT_POSITION
variables.description: Where album title text will be placed

variables.name: REFERENCE_ERA
variables.description: Era of album art to draw inspiration from

tips: Leave clear space at the top or bottom for your album title and artist name
Consider how the cover looks as a tiny thumbnail on Spotify since most listeners see it small
Generate multiple variations and pick the one that best captures your album mood
exampleOutput: A cyberpunk digital painting album cover showing a lone figure walking through rain-soaked neon-lit city streets, deep purple sky with neon pink building signs reflecting in wet pavement, cool blue shadows, clear space at top center for album title typography, synthwave aesthetic inspired by 1980s album art, atmospheric and moody, square 1:1 format, vinyl-quality detail.
metaTitle: Album Cover Designer Prompt for Midjourney
metaDescription: Design professional album cover art with Midjourney. Create genre-specific artwork with typography-ready compositions for any music style.
